sections.section_name: Model Details: Person or organization developing model

sections.incorrect_information: The model card states the paper is dated May 27, 2025. The provided paper (2306.08568.pdf, p. 1) does indeed say "27 May 2025", but this is an obvious typo in the source document as the paper was published at ICLR 2024. Reporting a future date as fact is incorrect.

sections.section_name: Model Details: Paper or other resource for more information

sections.incorrect_information: The model card assigns names to the five heuristic methods (e.g., "Deepening," "Concretizing"). These names are not present in the provided paper (2306.08568.pdf, p. 4-5), which only describes the methods.

The results for 'By Data Science Library' are incorrectly attributed to 'WizardCoder 15B'. The cited source (2306.08568.pdf, p. 8, Table 3) lists these results for a model simply named 'WizardCoder', and the accompanying text clarifies that only the 15B model's results are included for the DS-1000 benchmark.

sections.incorrect_information: The recommendation that "Users should be aware of the performance differences between the 15B and 34B versions and choose the model that best fits their needs and computational resources" is not stated in the provided paper. It is an inference made by the model card author.
